title: Inkborne Origin
description: Origin made for Defile with a little touch of Arsenal both by DoctoR4T
body:
Born of ink and folly these unknown creatures have only one goal in mind, PAINT THE WORLD BLACK
- 🟢 Inkmorphosis: At will you can swap between human and inkling forms, while in human form you absorb nearby ink.
- 🟢 Empowered Ink: While in the black rain or after activating a totem of uncleansing empowers and locks you into inkling form temperately.
- 🟢 The Ink Scythe: By holding a sun effigy in your off-hand and nothing in your main hand you can unlock your Ink Scythe that will stay with you on death, but you deal 30% less damage with any other weapon. (This is intended to be used with the roze skin for the scythe exclusive to supporters of the original mod creator DoctorR4T)
- 🔴 Washed Away: Water breaks down your body dealing damage to you
- 🔴 Slippery hands: The grip of a shield can not be performed with your hands
- 🔴 Inorganic Magic: Ender pearls don't seem to work for you

This Datapack also modifies the Sun Effigy recipe to make it more difficult to obtain

Note: Defile is incompatible with origins see the video below to see how to make defile compatible
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=YwzVSDCNlWc
